headline: 57% of Americans Say Their Portfolios Are Too Complex to Manage Alone
summary: A Charles Schwab Modern Wealth Survey 2025 finding that 57% of Americans agree modern investment portfolios are more sophisticated and require more professional guidance sits at the center of a broader shift in how households manage retirement money. The figure spans age groups and aligns with measurable changes in product mix, account structures, and the ... 57% of Americans Say Their Portfolios Are Too Complex to Manage Alone

headline: Robinhood Q1 Earnings Miss, Crypto Slump Drags Shares Lower
summary: HOOD stock slides nearly 9% after-hours as Q1 2026 earnings and revenue lag estimates. Crypto weakness and higher costs outweigh gains elsewhere.

raw.headline: Robinhood Q1 Earnings Miss, Crypto Slump Drags Shares Lower
raw.summary: HOOD stock slides nearly 9% after-hours as Q1 2026 earnings and revenue lag estimates. Crypto weakness and higher costs outweigh gains elsewhere.

headline: Under $80, Is HOOD Stock An Opportunity Or A Trap
summary: The central narrative buried beneath Robinhood's (HOOD) Q1 2026 data is a structural mismatch in scaling. The company is actively executing a transition toward a recurring revenue model. However, the high-quality, predictable income streams are currently unable to scale fast enough to offset the rapid deceleration in the legacy transaction business.
